predictions.description: Three csv-write-line calls (inline fields ×2 + valuesList variable) accumulate one record per call: first write creates the file with NO trailing newline, later writes prepend the record separator; the embedded-comma cell is quoted. get-csv-contents returns the raw file text.

dt-to-csv (includeHeaders=true, new path) writes exactly the header + rows with \n endings; the read-back proves the write. The second dt-to-csv with replaceExisting=false failed (buried) and did NOT clobber the file — this value is also the witness for that.
